name: brand-assets
title: Fuse brand assets
description: Fuse canonical brand asset bundle. Publishes the cleaned vector logo (fuse-logo.svg — pixel-terrace icon + Funnel Display wordmark, generator-artifact font-embed stripped, fill=currentColor + font-family=var(--font-display) for theming per Hard Rule 14). Binary assets (favicon.ico + fuse-icon-color/black/white.png + fuse-social-cover.jpg) ship in the registry repo at public/brand-assets/ — fetch via raw GitHub URLs: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/fuse-gtm/ui/main/public/brand-assets/{favicon.ico,fuse-icon-color.png,fuse-icon-black.png,fuse-icon-white.png,fuse-social-cover.jpg}. Source: /Users/dhruvraina/Downloads/fuse_logo_package (canonical bundle 2026-04-30, staged at /tmp/fuse-brand-assets/). Consume command: pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add @fuse/brand-assets — copies the cleaned SVG to public/fuse-logo.svg; binaries are downloaded manually per the URLs above (shadcn registry items inline file content as JSON strings; binary assets don't fit that pattern, so they live as static files in the registry repo).

files.content:

      </svg>

  <g transform="translate(36, 0)">
    <text x="0" y="0" font-family="var(--font-display), system-ui, sans-serif" font-size="24" font-weight="700" fill="currentColor" letter-spacing="0">fuse</text>
  </g>
</svg>
